prompt: Design a professional packaging mockup for my snack product using the uploaded label/logo, realistic pouch or box material texture, studio lighting, plain background, high resolution.
promptEn: Design a professional packaging mockup for my snack product using the uploaded label/logo, realistic pouch or box material texture, studio lighting, plain background, high resolution.
promptZh: 为我的 零食产品 设计一个专业的包装样机，使用上传的 标签/Logo，逼真的 袋装或盒装材质 纹理，摄影棚灯光，纯色背景，高分辨率。
